Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('index.html', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
for tag in ['div', 'section', 'html', 'body', 'nav']:
    opens = content.count\(f'<{tag}'\) 
    closes = content.count\(f'</{tag}>'\)
    print\(f'{tag}: opens={opens}, closes={closes}'\)
")
